caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seen recording in a studio with dark grey acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and over-ear headphones. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him, mounted on a boom arm that features the text "RØDE". The man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly across the sequence. In the initial frames, he has a slight smile while looking towards someone or something off-camera to his left. As the sequence progresses, his mouth remains open in mid-speech, and his gaze continues to be directed off-screen. The lighting remains consistent, and there is no movement of the camera or the equipment, capturing only the subtle movements of the man's face as he talks.
